items.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise; Google Beats Views, Reports Huge AI Spending
items.description: The rotation out of techs continued in a divided stock market, but Eli Lilly jumped. Google rose late on earnings and huge capital spending plans.

items.title: Rotation Trade a Boon for Dow 30 Today
items.description: That the Dow gained when tech-heavy indexes shed growth is a very direct link to the rotation trade.

items.title: Stock Market Today, Feb. 4: AMD Plunges Over 17% As Tech Fallout Continues
items.description: On Feb. 4, 2026, AMD’s AI-chip stumble rattled the Nasdaq while defensive Dow names steadied a suddenly nervous Wall Street.

items.title: Health Care Roundup: Market Talk
items.description: Find insight on Amgen, GSK, Novo Nordisk and more in the latest Market Talks covering health care sector.

items.title: Broader Market Falls as Chipmakers and AI Stocks Tumble
items.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) on Wednesday closed down -0.51%, the Dow Jones Industrials Index ($DOWI ) (DIA ) closed up +0.53%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) closed down -1.77%. March E-mini S&P futures (ESH26 ) fell -0.44%, and March E-mini Nasdaq futures...
